title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 3: CTAB-PVP Method
author: Beijing Genomics Institute
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4vygw7w
materials: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Add 200 mg – 500 mg...
steps.instruction: Add 200 mg – 500 mg of ground, frozen tissue to 3.0 mL of pre-heated extraction buffer in a 5 ml tube.

steps.title: Vortex the tube until the tissue...
steps.instruction: Vortex the tube until the tissue is mixed with the buffer.

steps.title: Incubate the tube at 65 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the tube at 65 °C for 00:30:00 (min), vortexing briefly ( 00:00:15 ) every 2–3 min during the incubation.

steps.title: Aliquot the mixture into four 2...
steps.instruction: Aliquot the mixture into four 2 ml RNase free tubes, 1 mL each tube.

steps.title: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge. All of the insoluble matter should form a pellet at the bottom of the tube. When used for algae the centrifugation was performed at .

steps.title: Pour the supernatant into a new...
steps.instruction: Pour the supernatant into a new 2 ml RNase free tube. When used for algae, 15 ml tubes were used.

steps.title: Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl...
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to fill the tube.

steps.title: Vortex tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy
steps.instruction: Vortex tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.

steps.title: Spin the tubes at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tubes at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge. When used for algae the centrifugation was performed at .

steps.title: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes. When used for algae, 15 ml tubes were used.

steps.title: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes.

steps.title: Spin the tubes at for 00:20:00 in a microcentrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tubes at for 00:20:00 in a microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Add 1 mL 75 % ethanol to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL 75 % ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Spin the tube at maximum speed...
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at maximum speed (> ) for 00:05:00 in a microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Repeat steps 14 and 15 one more time
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 14 and 15 one more time. go to step #14

steps.title: Open cap and air-dry the pellet
steps.instruction: Open cap and air-dry the pellet.

steps.title: Add 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet.

steps.title: Add equal volume of 25:24:1 acid...
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of 25:24:1 acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube.

steps.title: Vortex the tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy
steps.instruction: Vortex the tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.

steps.title: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to a new 2 ml RNase free tube.

steps.title: Vortex the tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy
steps.instruction: Vortex the tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.

steps.title: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to a new 2 ml RNase free tube.

steps.title: Spin the tube at for 00:20:00 in a microcentrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the tube at for 00:20:00 in a microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Add 1 mL 75 % cooled ethanol to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL 75 % cooled ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at .

steps.title: Wash the pellet twice with cooled 75 % DEPC-ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet twice with cooled 75 % DEPC-ethanol.

steps.title: Add 30 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the pellet.

steps.title: Treat RNA with DNase I as per supplier’s protocols
steps.instruction: Treat RNA with DNase I as per supplier’s protocols.

steps.title: Repeat step 7 to 9 one more time
steps.instruction: Repeat step 7 to 9 one more time. go to step #7

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C – 25 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C – 25 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity...
steps.instruction: Add 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity (M) LiCl to each tube.

steps.title: Mix and let stand at 4...
steps.instruction: Mix and let stand at 4 °C for 06:00:00 – 08:00:00 or overnight to precipitate RNA.

steps.title: Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Decant the supernatant carefully
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant carefully.

steps.title: Then add 70 µL SSTE buffer to each tube
steps.instruction: Then add 70 µL SSTE buffer to each tube.

steps.title: Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube.

steps.title: Add 2 volumes of cooled 100...
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes of cooled 100 % ethanol, 1/10 volumes of NaAc (pH 5.2) and 2 µL glycogen.

steps.title: Mix and incubate at -20 °C for 02:00:00
steps.instruction: Mix and incubate at -20 °C for 02:00:00 .

steps.title: Then decant the supernatant, taking care...
steps.instruction: Then decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care...
steps.instruction: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.

steps.title: Open cap and air-dry the pellet
steps.instruction: Open cap and air-dry the pellet.
